speaker: speaker1
text: Good morning , sir . May I see your passport ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , of course . Here it is .

speaker: speaker1
text: Thank you . Are all these yours ?

speaker: speaker2
text: No , some of them are my friend's . Do you want her passport , too ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes , please . Do you have any carry-on items ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Do you want me to put it on the belt , too ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes , please . Would you please open this big suitcase ?

speaker: speaker2
text: OK . Just a moment . It's just some clothes and toiletries .

speaker: speaker1
text: OK . Do you have anything to declare ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Any fresh food , live plants , or animals ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Thank you . You may lock up your suitcase . Here are your passports .
